_README: APPROXIMATE values DIGITIZED BY EYE from pgnncert.pdf Figure 7(a) Cora-ML (certified node accuracy vs perturbation size under node-injection attack). Provenance: digitized — NOT exact. Use only for the SOTA-landscape figure F1b with that caveat in the caption. Node-injection is PGNNCert's setting; Aethelred's edge-explanation certificate is a different threat model, so Aethelred is not on this plot.
_note: Bi-RS shown = Bi-RS-Exclude (the strongest RS variant). Bi-RS-Include drops by ~6 (between PGNNCert-E and Bi-RS-Exclude).
